title: Hollow Warden
description: a concept art version of the warden
body:
An edited version of the "Iron Golem to Hollow Warden" by ItsXoloti on planet minecraft (which was inspired by a warden concept art), to use the warden colors, and model instead of applying to the iron golem, and to work for versions with the warden AND for java edition.

Original by ItsXoloti on planet minecraft, edited by me

I was a big fan of how their warden looked, and ive always been disapoointed i couldnt use it on java. So im glad i know enough about making packs to make this now

dependency free
